shared_properties: Head, torso, and tail shapes stay aligned with the idle base pose.
Core palette remains #535353 with transparent background cutout only.
Canvas framing keeps the art inside an 88x94px box.
differences: Both feet lift away from the ground and tuck below the body.
Tail angle rises by 6px at the tip to counterbalance the airborne arc.
The pose uses one static frame because the jump read relies on trajectory rather than sheet motion.

context.usage: Shown during the airborne segment when the player clears ground obstacles and high air hazards.

shape.silhouette: Airborne side-profile T-Rex with both feet tucked and the tail lifted for balance.

face.eyes: One 4x4px eye cutout sits at x20-23 and y18-21 in each frame.
face.mouth: One 12px horizontal mouth slit sits below the eye line.

appendages.arms: Two short forearm clusters stay within a 10x8px chest block.
appendages.legs: Two hind legs use silhouette swaps that preserve the ground contact read.
appendages.tail: One thick tail extends 36px from the torso and rises 6px above the baseline at the tip.

specs.texture: Solid monochrome fill with transparent cutout background.

acceptance_criteria: The lowest opaque foot pixel sits at least 16px above the ground contact row used by the idle pose.
Only #535353 and transparency appear in painted pixels.

reference_images.label: t_rex_runner_sprite_sheet_2x
reference_images.purpose: Grounds player silhouette proportions, pose cadence, and frame timing for the runner states.

reference_images.label: t_rex_runner_sprite_sheet_1x
reference_images.purpose: Grounds player silhouette proportions, pose cadence, and frame timing for the runner states.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle with a single nearest-neighbor texture.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load through AssetServer in the Loading state and store the handle in a typed resource before gameplay starts.
runtime_notes: Snap transforms to whole pixels before render extraction.
Use visibility toggles or spawn pools instead of mutating image handles during active play.
Keep collider setup separate from the art bundle so gameplay forgiveness margins remain tunable.
